title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 163.013 - Schools offering both kindergarten and transportation, state aid, how computed
text:
163.013.  Schools offering both kindergarten and transportation, state aid, how computed. — Any school offering kindergarten and also offering transportation under section 167.231 shall receive state aid for kindergarten students under the same formula as prescribed by law under section 163.031.
(L. 1967 p. 245 § 2, A.L. 1993 S.B. 380)
